answer:
To authenticate with the SE Ranking API, you must use an API key generated from your account dashboard [1][2][3]. You can provide this key in one of two ways: via the Authorization HTTP header (recommended) or as a query parameter [1][4][3].

When using the Authorization header, format it as shown below [1][5]:

```
Authorization: Token YOUR_API_KEY
```

Alternatively, you may pass the key as a query parameter in your request URL [6][3]:

```
https://api.seranking.com/v1/endpoint?apikey=YOUR_API_KEY
```

The same key is used for both the Project and Data API endpoints [1][2]. You can generate your key by logging into your SE Ranking account and navigating to the API dashboard [1][3].
